title: Rapido Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Rapido Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Rapido Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a E-commerce Executive in Ghaziabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Rapido Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Rapido Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rapido Consulting Pvt Ltd!
